case_title: SHEK CHUNG TAM VS. WEN-BANG HUANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHEK CHUNG TAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WEN-BANG HUANG IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPERTER REBECCA CHAU, PROVISIONALLY CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE DEC-27-22.NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURN MAIL TO DEFENDANT (ENVOLOPE MARKED:VACANT UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED NOV-02-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, WEN-BANG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, SHEK CHUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, WEN-BANG $8,695.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,845.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TAM, SHEK CHUNG AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, WEN-BANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
